star_1.text: Had alot of cash saved up to be able to buy something. When I had to reinstall cause of issues with my phone it was all gone. That made me loose all intrest in buying any extras or even playing anymore. In the future you guys need to learn how to let people save progress when that happens so you dont loose future customers.

Had the first version,that was fine. Updated to the latest version, it won't even open, even after deleting it 3 times and reinstalling. It is a good game and i enjoy it but not Gunna waste anymore time on it. I am just deleting it and got something else.

I loved this game but the reason of putting only 1 star is it is because there are many problems and some weren't neccasary for removing it Step1:there are some other missing gems and are not present in the game Step 2:in the old version the worlds such as zombie caves, undersea world, jarrasic jungle, pharouh 's tomb. These worlds can be bought with 20 trail passes each, but now in the new version it now costs money. No one says it should cost money Step 3: this game sucks a lot this way

I edited my review from 5 stars to 1. I have purchased a pack from this game and bought a lot of in game boosts and power ups. The transaction was from 7 years. I have installed the game recently and nothing was saved and I need to start from zero. All my purchases were not saved into the game. I demand my money back or to get all the in game stuff which I paid for.

A Very Stupid Endless Game like Temple Run. This game suppose to be like Despicable me Minion game of different levels, and when we complete a Mission the game will end and go back to home, then we can now play the next level. Many of Developers are not yet waken up, cos endless game is just Rubbish while it makes players to get tire and feel boring. But a levels game will make players to continue enjoying it

Every time I have to reinstall this game for any reason, I have to re-purchase all my worlds and items. LOVE the game, but will quit playing because I can't get any help from Switzerland for this. UPDATE: Quit playing for awhile, still the same issues 3 years later.

Sad game, The swipe (left, right, up or down) controls fail most of the time which leads to untimely end! Also, most of the items available in the Store to purchase, are if you spend money only, not sure why exactly Nuggets can't be used ?

Ths game is basically worthless now. I e-mailed support because I lost all my progress, including the stuff I PAID FOR, like ALL THE HEROES, and they told me they don't support this game anymore because they need to allocate resources to newer titles. if that's the case, remove this title from the app store and and give me some play store credit!

Was The BEST interactive game Ever. I've completed all of the missions multiple times. When will you add more?? I changed my rating from 5⭐ to 1⭐ because you recently put rotating ad banners at the top of the game screen that cover the pause button and the amount of gold earned. This MUST go Now!!

used to be a game that i played a lot on my old phone. downloaded it on new phone and it froze on the first screen the first time i even opened it. i kept trying to close and open again but every time it would freeze within the first few seconds.

this is stupid i somehow get charged even when i have it now without my parents knowing and now somehow im charged over hundreds of dollars when i first got the game there was a weird bug where all the maps and caracters were free and i could play. it now i get charged for playing the maps and characters. now im in trouble you suck

fun buy there's too many forcibly suggested in-app purchases and adverts.

star_3.text: Downloaded this hoping it was an app version of the DK64 minecart challenges, but with more variety than just the 3 on the N64. Unfortunately, I found it to be glacially slow.

It's a good passtime game reminiscent of temple run, but with this game you ride rails. It's kind of low poly, but the music is good, and there are multiple levels. There are also upgrades, secrets apparently, and other stuff that I have not discovered. In summary, good game.

It's a good game. It has diffrrent worlds, stages and challenges. The design is good too. But there are some off things. First the design and the worlds haven't changed for many years. definitely needs more worlds (specially free worlds) and design upgrade. Also the only challenge is the speed. You won't see different things or stages when you go. It's boring to see the same secret world, the same snowballs, the same ghosts, etc when you play.

The game is good, but needs some update. The cost of the cart items such as the permanent steel ram and grids should be in nuggets, whatever their cost may be, because you have to purchase it with a lot of money. Developers please make its cost in nuggets as you are being warned because the game's costing a lot of money this way.

This game is ok ok not very good. Because there is a very big mistake which is we can't buy the other roots such as Zombie caves, Amazonia world and many more, there should be option to buy them not at low nuggets but can be in high amount of nuggets. That's why I am rating this app with three stars only. If the maker is reading this so please do this change in the app in the form of updates....please. So that I can rate this app with five stars....When I enter the secret part that was cool..👌❤

so adventurous,there are so many secret places on the way of the game. we can really enjoy this on any time at any place for any one .There is lots and lots of tressure such as Rock egg ,gems etc.In this game there are number of characters ,levels, places etc gave curious to play and win .but the problem is we couldn't purchase anything from this game then they ask real money and in some time they make us fools by emptying the gifts.we can't play the next level so I give only 3 Stars.😋♥️

I had previously rated this game 5 stars but recently whenever the game is over and the 'save me' button comes up, i don't even press the button and 3000 nuggets are gone! This is so frustrating specially for someone who's been playing this game for such a long time. Kindly fix this issue before i completely stop playing the game!

This game is good but the thing is when I get those egg rocks in which u get prizes i have noticed there won't be prize inside. like one time it's oh k but 3 eggs continues I didn't get any prizes and also i would love this game if it didn't have tilting in it because when ur speed gets faster it's really hard to tilt and I end up losing overall apart from these the game is good.

I used to love this game. The soundtrack and the vibes I got was just fabulous! This game is genius. Can't express in words. But later after almost 4 years when it was updated almost all 'worlds' and some other vital things are now needed to buy, w is very saddening.

I don't know why but I've been playing this game from past 6 years & not a single issue occurred but today, my game got stuck in between & when I re-started it, suddenly, the nuggets (money)'s value got on minus( - ) .. I don't know what's happening, maybe it's a part of game or something crashed... Please help.

Very amazing game I had a lot of fun playing it for the first time specially I play this game my free time. The graphics of this game very eye touching, after the achievement new levels and different places make this game more attractive.

My biggest disappointment was you cannot buy the other maps with your coins you have to pay real life money for it and I don't like that even for some characters you have to unlock those maps they really need to change that and another thing is when ever you collect 3 or 4 rock eggs two will come empty for sure and it has lot of glitches they really need to work on this game for sure 😒😒
every thing is good but there are no updates for so many years same track same targets and same missions need to update getting bore pls update with new targets and new missions

This game is good fun and interesting the only problem is that if you get a present sometimes you won't find nothing in it which is is a problem because coins in this game are kind of rare let's say compare that to Subway Surfers which are everywhere and I want them to do like something like a transformation like they did on Subway Surfers getting a superpower and doing something else that you can do while driving

Giving 3 stars because all items should be bought with nuggets. Not real money. Make a different "support us" button for donations if you need money. Not everyone has spare money for in-game purchases. Overall it's a solid 10/10 game.

This Game is good in graphics, control, etc. But it has a very big problem. I noticed that when I passed a level it gave me 4,500 nuggets and in the game, I collected about 5000 nuggets. But it didn't added the 4500 nuggets I was rewarded. That's wrong. Please fix this.

i like this game but to be honest i think no one would spend money to buy some magnet in games to collect niggets or spend money to buy new character and tracks i think instead of this the tracks and character should be unlocked as per ypur performance in game like if u collect 1000 nigget at once new character should be unlocked if u cover a distance of 5000m at once new track should unlocked. This will make thia more attractive
Clunky unresponsive controls + dated graphics

Hi, this is wonderful game , I like this game very much because it have amazing worlds. But it have very big mistake . Sometimes I play it and lose . I am no need of save but this is saved and my 3000 coins are waste. Please proper this problem otherwise I decided this game. THANKS.

This game is good😊but the mistry egg which they are giving is only giving always that no item inside and if it gives also the item than it will give that the player will not get the wooden pillars in game, means I think the should only offer the passes and the no items option Bcz as they are giving the option of no wooden pillar in the game also makes the game easy at least the game should be complicated..... star_4.text: I used to play this game 5-6years back, and now I'm playing it again. Nothing has changed, the same worlds, same challenges free or not. Recently this problem has been occurring where I'm doing what I'm supposed to, to escape the obstacles, but I die anyway. Also some permanent cart stuff should be available to be paid with the game money. Overall it's a fun game.

While i do think this is a great runner game there are a few flaws i have with this game. 1- The heroes: Almost All of the heroes are locked behind a paywall and the few ones that aren't locked behind a paywall cost a lot of nuggets or just give you more nuggets 2- The worlds: Again, almost all of them are locked behind a paywall, and you can try for 3 passes but shouldn't it be 2 or 1 passes? Maybe make the paid worlds also accesable by spending 15,000 nuggets or something.

It's an extremely amazing game which will offer you the boots of a daredevil explorer and incredibly new worlds ! I eagerly request the creator to make a Rail Rush 2 (as I have seen many people expecting it)! It's highly recommended for those adventurers out there ! My only problem is that most of the worlds has to be bought or played by 3 passes. I highly request the creator to look into this matter, if they don't want to lose customers in the future. If they do it, it's 5 stars from my side.

I used to play this game when I was 8 years old and overall it brings back some mesmerizing memory but one thing to be noted that while playing a round after a certain time interval it becomes so fast all of a sudden that it becomes difficult to control the features as for mobile users. Even though I am 17 years old now hehe. so yeah my gaming skills shut off now but for to experience some great moments it's definitely a great deal.:)

So I used to play this game as a kid and I really enjoyed it but after redownloading it, I have a few problems. Firstly, it's annoying that not all the levels are free. Secondly, I never realised how terrible the game looks by today's standards. I thought they would've updated the graphics by now. Still it's a really fun game so I give it 4 stars

This game is good but they should not charge for upgrading instead they should avail the option to make the upgrades available to users with the coins collected in the game itself. How can you collect 38500 coins only in the first level in order to unlock a character while the cart accelerates so fast and it bcomes so difficult to control the game ? PLEASE don't ask for real money for purchasing different worlds because my parents won't allow for that. That's all changes I ask for in the game.

When you have your rail cart decked out with everything when turning to avoid the dia de Los muertos zombie it will knock you off even if you turn to avoid it can it be fixed please! Also it would be nice to be able to get steam power and the hand brake equipped together. It should allow you to equip everything you get like dynamite too.

Great game, but I would like to be able to see mission progress as you're working on them during a run. Also, it's nice when you can unlock features along the way as you level up rather than having everything available right at the start. Now leveling up is only to receive extra gold.

I remember when I played this years ago and I finally found this game again. I came to see what changes were made and I came to see that nothing really changed. Which is both good and bad. New players would come to find this game amazing as veterans are here for the nostalgia trip. It sucks to see nothing changed but it is still addictive. I think this game needs some sort of makeover and polishing as it is kinda out of date compared to the of all of the new games. Still recommend to most people

What a wonderful game l have been playing this game ever since morning. Mostly l have like the heroes in this game the way they scream when they have fallen off the rails it has nice graphics u can enter new worlds even with passes or trials the only thing is that when l want to buy a new world it keeps saying prossesing purchase which must be worked on but otherwise every thing super in this game every one must intall this game!!! LOVE IT

I reviewed this game earlier 3*. Now it's 4* due to changes that addressed my issues. Still be nice to find the secret areas in the alternative environments. I've played 6000+ times spread over all of them using the trial passes & haven't. Or are they unavailable except in paid version? Idk. Anyway, ad changes were good enough to keep me from uninstalling. ♥️Love this game!

I really like this game. It's very fun and I like the different worlds. The only thing bad about this game is that it's very repetitive. I wish there was an option for playing online with people and friends. I really like the pharoah tomb and the other worlds where you have to have 3 passes to play it but I wish it was free. Miniclip try to include mutiplayer so it can be more fun and I advise you because I am an EXPERT who looks at games and this game is good. Carry on Miniclip with your games.

Awesome . Problem is this we have to buy some things with real money (mission) but we can't buy . It take three passes to try once and then if you want to play wether you have to buy or need three more passes or don't play . Moreover this gamr is awesome . Please fix it.

I like this game. The animation used is really very fascinating. There are different worlds in this and all of them are interesting. The only thing I don't like is that while playing for longer time the speed increases suddenly. But overall the is game is superb.

A very nostalgic game for me. I used to play this for hours 4-5 years back. I disagree with upgrading graphics but it could be more interesting if the non-free levels could be made available without passes. A good game tho! ✌️

This is a great adventure game and I played it 6 to 8 months ,I like that there is many world we can play but some of the world we have to play if only have trial pass it is not easy to get and we can buy trial pass by giving 10000 gold we cannot understand that level by playing one or two time, my request is that please make this game that we can play all these level ,I giving 4 star for this reason. Hope you will update and add new things in this game and this is a good time passing game.

Good but a few glitches... Tilting, sometimes you still crash even though you are tilting enough in the right direction going past the wooden tilt barrier. Also it sometimes doesn't respond when you swipe to move over or duck or jump... But it's very rare or I would have gotten fed up and deleted the game... Kids love it too.

i use to play this game back in 2017 still when i have flagship phone after playing it i felt full of nostalgia and brought all the old days that we have limited storage and internet so that we have to share the game through xender or share it to friends btw live the life before it is too late for us and have fun.☺️

star_5.text: been playing since childhood. still the favorite. so engaging

I'm reviewing Rail Rush, a game I fondly remember playing when I was 7 years old. Now, 10 years later at 17, I'm revisiting the game and reflecting on how my gaming tastes have evolved. I recall the addictive gameplay, colorful graphics, and endless fun I had navigating through treacherous tracks and collecting treasures. I'm excited to see how the game has held up over time and share my thoughts on its current state.
I have recently bought undersea world and pharaohs tomb. along by unlocking captain Nemo and Sandy sultan. Honestly it's an addictive game. it's fun and undersea world purchase was the best decision.

this is the best game.i remember when i used to play it when i was younger 8-9 yrs back and was obsessed with this.the thrilling emotions,the maps and the excitement to collect the eggs.im so glad this og game is still the way it was before.kjndly keep it like this.
This game is like when you mine in the mines except you aren't mining! you're rushing on the rails! yes, the name isn't a lie, you do infact rail rush!
It's such a classic. I played this as a child, and it feels great to play it again. Snow Land will always be my favorite map.

I absolutely love this game! it's the best game I've ever played from the play store! I'm so glad they have added new rankings because I got thru it so fast when it was only 10. The only thing is I wish you could use nuggets to buy different worlds than real money. I also love that you can still play and defeat the game without using real money! 2 thumbs up!!

Great game, fun and intrestingly enough to want to play again and again ! ~best of the Subway Surfer type games~ a few issues that are negative are: too easy to tap once extra while dying and buy a unwanted 3000 coin continue. really bad is you cant use multiple "use on demand" power ups on run, only one can be avalible...! There is no mention of this before you buy them, making some useless. would be nice if you changed that and can have a steam engine and brake avalible per run!

I just ❤❤❤❤ it. Such a amazing game.😀 I am SPEECHLESS ☺ I have a suggestion that if your team can make RAIL RUSH 2 with more new features. Very very good game. Actually very good game. It is because I am a subway surfer player. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐x100000

This game is one of the last relics of a time when games actually used to be FUN. Rather than making every player rage. This game is straight up a classic if u ask me. I LOVE this game and everything in it from the music to the pace of acceleration EVERYTHING. I just wish that the devs dont change anything. It is just perfect the way it is and forever will be. And honestly if people are hating on the game for not having autosave or the rock eggs sometimes not having loot in them well SKILL ISSUE

Me and my cousins used to play this game like 6-7 years ago in our parents phones but now after knowing about this game by just a random think feels so nostalgic like literally the game is as it was 6-7 years back just a new mode n a new character that's it. Everything is same the bgm , the graphics, the menu; Everything!! And I just love that thing of leaving the game as it is; The Original!!! no updates,no changes 🥹 Will definitely play this game for a long

A mean little game that has you hooked from the get go. The controls will have you wanting to pull your own hair out as you battle to hard wire your coordination in with them. However! persivier and you'll soon be Rock-'n'-rolling instead of rolling and rocking and pulling your wig off. An easy 5 star app worthy of being in The Playstore * * * * *. Thank You Rail Rush for the satisfaction I'm getting as I get further along the track. Stick at it!!!.

The best mobile game I have ever played. Barely any ads and any purchase removes the ads pemently. This game has tons of different upgrades, charters , (that actually have useful abilities) and different worlds to explore. This game was made when mobile games where made right and entertaining and it's still a great game. Rail rush is a better subway surfers game its cooler, has way less ads, has fair microtransactions, (Which are never forced upon the player). So overall this game is awesome. 😃
